zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Wilson於1565年2月22日出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德時，他的父親Robert Wilson40歲，母親Joane Ellis39歲。他於1596年5月9日與Alice Wilcock在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年1月6日在英國英格蘭越可爾米費爾德享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Wilson was born on 22 February 1565, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Wilson, was 40 and his mother, Joane Ellis, was 39. He married Alice Wilcock on 9 May 1596, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 6 January 1630, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Wilson est né le 22 février 1565, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Wilson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joane Ellis, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wilcock le 9 mai 1596, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1630, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Wilsonが1565年2月22日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert Wilsonは40歳，母Joane Ellisは39歳であった。1596年5月9日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでAlice Wilcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年1月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Wilson(이)가 1565년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wilson(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Ellis(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1596년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Alice Wilcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미르필드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Wilson родился 22 февраля 1565 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Wilson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Ellis, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wilcock 9 мая 1596 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер 6 января 1630 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Wilson nació el 22 de febrero de 1565, en Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Wilson, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joane Ellis, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alice Wilcock el 9 de mayo de 1596, en Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1630, en Mirfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
